response:
<> to replace one url with another within a string in php you can use the str_replace function which works well for simple replacements including repeating instances of the same string here is an example of how you can achieve this ```php $string = 'new post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $old_url = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $new_url = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $new_string = str_replace($old_url, $new_url, $string); echo $new_string; ``` this will replace all instances of the old url with the new one in the string a palindrome is a word phrase number or other sequence of characters that reads the same forward and backward ignoring spaces punctuation and capitalization an example is "madam" or "racecar"
